title: EPIC: Web monitoring dashboard -> control plane (FastAPI)
source: CEO request 2026-05-29: live web dashboard to monitor the service + active strategy; explicitly think ahead to a control plane (expose actions/functions, portfolio mgmt, corporate actions, multi-strategy). Stack approved: FastAPI+uvicorn+Jinja/htmx.
why: Single seam to observe (and later act on) the live armed survival book from a browser. FastAPI keeps it same-language as execution/ so it reuses the exact state contracts and can grow typed action endpoints + OpenAPI + websockets without a rewrite. Safety invariant: the web NEVER touches the broker; it reads state files and (phase 2+) emits command intents the service consumes idempotently, so the execution loop stays the single broker-actor.
scope: Phase 1 (B0097): read-only dashboard, localhost-bound, no actions.
Phase 2 (B0098): action endpoints via command-intent files + auth; CEO+risk-officer gated.
Phase 3 (B0099): multi-book/portfolio, multi-account (demo+Syphonix), corporate actions, historical analytics.

history.reason: feat(dashboard): phase-1 read-only live monitor (FastAPI) for the survival book
